Title: soap_client
Feature: soap_client(url, operation, target_namespace, parameters, headers, soap_action, attachments, ticket, passwd, user_name, user_password, auth_type, security_type, debug, template, style, version, direction, http_header, security_schema, time_out)
Description: Invoke a SOAP service and returns result value.
This will invoke the specified SOAP service.
Examples:
resp :=
	SOAP_CLIENT (
	  url=>'http://example.com/SecureWebServices',
	  operation=>'AddInt',
	  parameters=>vector (vector ('a', 'int'), 3, vector ('b', 'int'), 4),
	  auth_type=>'key',
	  ticket=>xenc_key_inst_create ('WSDK Sample Symmetric Key'),
	  security_type=>'encrypt',
	  target_namespace=>'http://temp.uri/',
	  soap_action=>'"http://temp.uri/#AddInt"',
	  style=>6);
